title: Active ETF Market Too Big to Ignore: Spence
description: Travis Spence, Global Head of ETF at JPMorgan Asset Management joins Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" to discuss the intensifying race to bring actively managed ETFs to market.  (Source: Bloomberg)
